## Frame 4 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. TRANSFORM KEYFRAME NOTE: this is the PEAK of the sand-to-gold-dust veil — the impossible move at full crest: the swirling gold dust has resolved into a luminous gold-dust veil trailing in a grand arc from both hands, the air alive with shimmering golden motes. Face fully recognizable throughout; this interpolates from the Frame 3 START to the settled hand-glow of the Frame 5 END.

WARDROBE: the sand-and-amber silk gown, continuity-locked, the sheer fabric veil meeting the new gold-dust veil in a clean luminous transition, fully modest and pristine.

HAIR: the soft windswept waves, continuity-locked, lit bright gold by the dust, color locked.

MAKEUP: the warm golden glow, continuity-locked, the lid echoing the gold dust, real pores.

HANDS & NAILS: both hands trailing the luminous gold-dust veil in a wide grand arc, fingers soft and alive mid-flow; short almond rose-nude nails, neat cuticles.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a serene radiant awe — eyes warm and direct to lens with a luminous golden catchlight, a soft open closed-lip smile, lids easing in the glow, the peak emotional beat held with calm wonder.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: graceful carriage spiralled to its fullest in the veil-turn, both arms trailing the gold-dust veil wide and high, weight flowing through the turning leg with a soft hip curve, spine long and breathing, unmistakably at the crest of the turn.

CHOREOGRAPHY FLOW: the apex of the phrase — both arms describe a wide grand arc trailing the gold-dust veil up and around as the turn reaches its fullest rotation, the body opening to its grandest warm line; the most expansive, most flowing beat of the dance, every joint alive with follow-through, the gold streaming outward. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) both arms trail the gold-dust veil wide through a grand arc; (b) the spine reaches its fullest soft spiral; (c) the silk gown catches the rotation; (d) the legs carry the turn from the hip to its crest.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) the gold-dust veil shimmering and trailing along both arms; (2) bright motes turning and suspending in the air; (3) waves flaring in the turn; (4) sand streaming gold through the beam; (5) chest held at the top of a slow breath; (6) warm speculars racing along the silk; (7) the gold-dust veil rippling with the arms; (8) a slow eyelash settle at the crest.

LIGHTING: KEY — golden-hour raking key from back-right. FILL — soft warm sand-bounce below. RIM — a radiant gold rim setting the gold-dust veil and silk alight. PRACTICAL — the sun flaring strongest. SEPARATION — the dune shadow rich so she reads about 2.5 stops up. BOUNCE — a strong warm kick across the dust.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium-wide, head-to-thigh to show the full veil arc, 8% headroom, the gold motes filling the negative space.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium-wide frame — head to thigh — to show the full veil arc, about 8% headroom, gold motes filling the negative space. The widest, most expansive body of the concept: spiralled to its fullest in the veil-turn, both arms trailing the gold-dust veil wide and high, weight flowing through the turning leg. Camera pulls back to hold the whole figure and the grand veil. She reads as a flowing three-quarter caught mid-turn, centred, the gold-dust veil arcing around her — the warm mystic apex. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 85mm, f/2.2; focus split between her near eye and the nearest gold-dust veil so both read crisp; the desert a smooth warm field; turning motes rendering as bright golden bokeh; gentle roll-off, no clipping.

COLOR GRADE: warm cinematic desert — honey-gold highlights, warm amber midtones, soft rose-bronze shadows, rich clean blacks, luminous golden speculars, bright warm vibrance, no muddy or washed contrast (vivid golden-hour lane).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the returning veil-lift; playback real-time, loop-matched to Frame 1.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips return to the serene closed-lip Frame 1 smile (silent reel).

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (sand/gold-dust/veil/hair/silk/light), mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, frozen background, identity flicker, visible loop seam.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 6 — full reel, lands across the cut, anchored at the Frame 4 gold-dust-veil crest): a warm cinematic world-fusion bed, serene and mystical — a soft hand-drum pulse (frame-drum and tabla-adjacent), a breathy ney-flute melody, warm sustained strings and a soft swelling pad, with a fine granular shimmer tracing the gold dust. Tempo slow and flowing around 70–76 BPM, key warm and modal with a serene lift. The bed kindles with the gold-dust ignition (Frame 3), swells to its radiant peak as the gold-dust veil forms (Frame 4), eases under the serene reveal smile (Frame 5), drifts through the closing flourish (Frame 6) and resolves on a sustained warm ney-and-string chord at Frame 7 that loops seamlessly back to the open with no audible seam. Keep it under the diegetic desert-wind, sand-hiss and gold-shimmer SFX — warm and present, never a full driving mix. No voice (silent reel). (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

# CONCEPT 7 — FROST BALLET

Title: Pillar 1 — Crystalline Serene (frozen-palace ballet beauty)

Format: Frost Ballet Beauty Hero / Crystalline Cinematic-Editorial (BP category — cool luminous glow)

Hero Product: "Frost" cooling hydration glow-gel — a frosted crystal-blue glass jar with a brushed-silver collar and a soft glass lid, a dewy ice-clear gel that throws cool crystalline speculars; accent hero a single frost-bloom blooming across the jar's frosted surface.

Setting: a frozen crystal palace ballet-hall at blue hour — frosted-glass walls, suspended ice crystals catching light, a soft blue-white glow, fine snow drifting slow through still air, a polished frost floor, clean and vast (cool crystalline lane, luminous and vivid, never washed grey or muddy).

Wardrobe: a pale ice-blue ballet-couture gown with a structured bodice and a long flowing tulle skirt, a modest high neckline and long sheer sleeves, fully modest, the tulle and silk catching the cool light and floating with each adagio line.

Hair: a sleek frost-kissed low ballet bun with a soft centre part and a few fine face-framing strands, a glossy smooth finish, color locked to reference.

Makeup: cool crystalline glow: a frosted icy-pearl lid, a cool silver-white highlight on the high points, soft brushed brows, a cool rose lip with a dewy sheen, real pores and fine vellus texture.

Choreography: frozen-ballet adagio — slow balletic port de bras, a long arabesque line, a soft développé unfolding, a slow controlled pirouette, and a melting plié-to-rise; every movement flows out of the last with continuous follow-through and soft breath-led recovery, the limbs always tracing long lines, never locking or snapping (cool continuous flow).

Movement / Transform: adagio port de bras → frost-bloom crystal gown grow (the one impossible move) — as she sweeps a slow adagio line, frost crystals bloom across the gown and grow outward into a glittering crystalline ice-couture overlay with delicate crystal sleeves, then settle into a soft frosted shimmer.

Concept Line: "cool, calm, radiant."

Duration: 21 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: CRYSTALLINE SERENE

Composition: centered cool hero with vast frosted negative space for the frost-bloom and snow to drift.

Grade: cool crystalline — icy blue-white highlights, cool silver midtones, soft blue shadows, rich clean blacks, luminous crystalline speculars, full mid-tone, bright cool vibrance, no muddy grey or washed contrast (vivid blue-hour crystal lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "cool, calm, radiant." (English, natural Indian accent, soft and serene.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (a still icy room tone, fine snow-drift hush, delicate frost-crackle chimes, soft tulle rustle) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a serene crystalline bed with soft glassy bells, a slow cello line and an airy choir pad, kept low under the line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the ballet gown is fully modest; the mood is cool, serene and graceful, never sexualized; movement is choreographic and flowing.

## Frame 3 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium, chest-up to mid-forearm, subject fills about 60% of the vertical frame.

Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium close, chest-up, subject fills about 55% of the vertical frame — matched to Frame 1.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: returns to the exact Frame 1 start position with a slow 8% push reset (one move), so the loop hands off invisibly.

LENS: 85mm, f/2.2.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: the closing flow returns her free arm through the opening port de bras and her gaze back to the Frame 1 hook on a slow breath — the dance completing its endless circle, decelerating into the exact start pose through pure flow so play-through loops with no seam. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: presenting hand eases the jar back to the chest, free arm rises into the opening port-de-bras line, spine returns to its opening lifted carriage, legs return to the high relevé-ready stance.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–2.4s — Aira eases the jar back to chest height and her arm flows back through the opening port de bras, the frosted shimmer catching a last soft glint.
- 2.4–4.5s — she returns to the serene composed almost-smile and cool direct gaze, matching the Frame 1 hook exactly. One clean continuous loop-resolve, real physics.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: continuous life all the way into the loop — breath, tulle float, drifting bun-strands, micro weight-shifts, the port-de-bras follow-through, living eyes and a slow blink — matched to Frame 1 so the cycle never reveals a freeze or a seam.

LIGHTING: identical to Frame 1 — soft cool-blue key, silver fill, icy rim, ice-crystal practical, cool shadow held rich.

ENVIRONMENT: frozen palace, returned to the opening state, snow drifting and tulle floating.

AUDIO: diegetic plus the music bed. Ambient — still icy room tone and snow hush matched to Frame 1. SFX — a soft glass-tap at 2.1s as the jar settles, a faint frost-crackle chime at 3.6s. Reaction — a soft serene breath at 2.2s. The master track resolves on a sustained glassy-bell-and-cello chord that loops seamlessly back into the Frame 1 bed with no audible seam (present, never full). VO — none.

DURATION: 4 seconds (0:17–0:21 of 21s total).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the returning port de bras; playback real-time, loop-matched to Frame 1.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips return to the serene composed Frame 1 almost-smile.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (frost/crystal/snow/tulle/hair/light), mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, frozen background, identity flicker, visible loop seam.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 7 — full reel, lands across the cut, anchored at the Frame 4 crystal-gown crest and the Frame 5 line): a serene crystalline bed, cool and luminous — soft glassy bells and celeste, a slow expressive cello line, an airy choir pad and a fine glassy shimmer tracing the frost-bloom. Tempo slow and flowing around 66–72 BPM, key cool and major-modal with a serene lift. The bed kindles with the frost-bloom (Frame 3), swells to its luminous peak as the crystalline gown forms (Frame 4), ducks cleanly under the spoken line "cool, calm, radiant." (Frame 5) so the vocal sits forward, then resolves on a sustained glassy-bell-and-cello chord at Frame 6 that loops seamlessly back to the open with no audible seam. Keep it under the diegetic snow-hush, tulle-rustle and frost-crackle SFX — cool and present, never a full driving mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

# CONCEPT 8 — MONSOON KATHAK

Title: Pillar 4 — Joyful Romantic (monsoon-courtyard kathak beauty)

Format: Monsoon Kathak Beauty Hero / Romantic Cinematic-Editorial (BQ category — dewy luminous glow)

Hero Product: "Monsoon" dewy face mist — a clear glass bottle with a fine atomiser and a brushed-rose-gold collar, a fresh dewy mist that throws soft luminous speculars and hangs in fine droplets; accent hero a single fan of mist catching the warm lantern light.

Setting: a sandstone haveli courtyard in the monsoon at dusk — warm carved-stone arches, warm lantern glow, soft rain falling in silver threads, shallow puddles mirroring the lanterns, lush green vines and jasmine, a clean romantic depth (warm monsoon lane, richly green-and-gold and vivid, never washed grey or muddy).

Wardrobe: a flowing kathak-couture anarkali in deep monsoon-green silk with gold zari borders and a sheer dupatta, a modest high neckline and long sleeves, fully modest, the skirt and dupatta flaring in wide arcs with each chakkar and catching the lantern light.

Hair: a sleek romantic low braid wound with a string of jasmine, a soft centre part and a few face-framing strands, dewy with fine rain, color locked to reference.

Makeup: dewy monsoon glow: a warm bronze-and-green-gold lid, a luminous dewy highlight on the high points, soft full brows, a soft berry lip with a fresh sheen, real pores and fine vellus texture with tiny rain-dew beads.

Choreography: kathak — fast spotted chakkars (spins), graceful hand mudras and wrist flourishes, crisp tatkar footwork, wide circular arm extensions, and a chakkar resolving into a posed mudra; every movement flows out of the last with continuous follow-through and breath-led recovery, the arms and dupatta always tracing arcs, never locking or snapping (joyful continuous flow).

Movement / Transform: chakkar spin → rain-to-jasmine petal burst (the one impossible move) — as she whirls a fast chakkar, the falling rain caught in her spin transforms into a joyful burst of white jasmine petals that swirl up and around her, then drift down settling in her hair and dupatta.

Concept Line: "fresh as first rain."

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: JOYFUL ROMANTIC

Composition: centered warm hero with lush monsoon negative space for the rain and jasmine to swirl.

Grade: warm monsoon dusk — deep-green and gold highlights, warm amber-lantern midtones, soft teal shadows, rich clean blacks, luminous dewy speculars, full mid-tone, bright warm vibrance, no muddy grey or washed contrast (vivid monsoon-dusk lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "fresh as first rain." (English, natural Indian accent, warm and joyful.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (soft falling rain, gentle distant thunder, anklet ghungroo chimes on the footwork, dupatta whip, a fresh mist-spritz) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a joyful romantic Indo-fusion bed with tabla, sitar, a warm string swell and soft ghungroo, kept low under the line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the anarkali is fully modest; the mood is joyful, romantic and fresh, never sexualized; movement is choreographic and flowing.

## Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: the deep monsoon-green silk anarkali with gold zari borders and sheer dupatta, the modest high neckline and long sleeves catching the warm lantern light in soft luminous reflections, the dupatta beginning to lift, fully modest, pristine, zero lint or snags, fine rain-dew on the silk, no accessories beyond delicate gold jhumkas and a slim gold cuff.

HAIR: the sleek romantic low braid wound with jasmine, a soft centre part, a few face-framing strands dewy with fine rain and reading as real individual hairs in the lantern glow, color locked to reference.

MAKEUP: dewy monsoon glow — a warm bronze-and-green-gold lid catching the lantern light, glassy real skin with visible pores, fine vellus texture and tiny rain-dew beads, a luminous dewy highlight on cheekbone, brow-bone and nose-bridge, soft full brows, a soft berry lip with a fresh sheen, inner-corner gold brightener.

HANDS & NAILS: right hand cradling the Monsoon mist bottle at chest height, fingertips light on the clear glass with natural nail-bed color and no white-knuckle pressure; left hand raised in a graceful kathak mudra near the shoulder, wrist flourishing and fingers softly splayed, alive; short almond nails in a soft berry-rose, cuticles neat.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a joyful warmth — lids bright and a hair lifted, a soft radiant almost-smile pulling both corners, lips parted barely 1mm on a held beat, eyes warm and direct to lens with a warm lantern catchlight, the faintest joyful lift at the cheek.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: graceful kathak carriage — torso lifted and rotated about 6°, weight poised on a soft demi-plié ready to spin with a 3° hip curve, the front shoulder open, chin lifted with joyful line, spine lengthened and breathing; mid-beat and alive (living stillness), clearly caught mid-mudra rather than held.

CHOREOGRAPHY FLOW: this is the opening beat of a continuous kathak phrase — her left arm is mid-mudra flourish, the line travelling shoulder → elbow → rolling wrist → splayed fingertip, the spine lifting from a just-finished tatkar. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the mudra arm carries a flourishing circular line; (b) the spine lifts from the prior footwork recovery; (c) the free hand cradles the bottle at the chest; (d) the legs hold a soft demi-plie ready to spin. The frame catches the instant of suspension within the phrase, every joint alive with breath-led follow-through, nothing locked.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a face-framing strand lifting slow, dewed with rain; (2) the dewy mist catching a soft glint inside the tilted bottle; (3) soft rain falling in silver threads behind her; (4) the dupatta lifting a few millimetres as she breathes; (5) chest lifting on a joyful breath; (6) warm speculars sliding along the clear glass and rose-gold collar as the bottle tips; (7) her mudra fingertip still carrying the last millimetre of the flourish; (8) a barely-perceptible eyelash settle completing a blink, a rain-bead trembling on a lash.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the Monsoon bottle and her cradling fingers at roughly 20% frame depth, tack sharp, rose-gold collar forward. MIDGROUND — Aira centred, three-quarter torso, mudra arm raised. BACKGROUND — warm sandstone arches, lanterns and rain softly defocused with a warm glow behind her head for clean separation, falling rain, lush vines, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — a warm lantern-gold beauty key feathered from above-front producing luminous dewy modelling. FILL — a soft warm bounce below lifting the under-chin just clean (warm clamshell). RIM — a soft teal-and-gold rim skimming the braid and shoulder, catching the rain threads to separate from the courtyard. PRACTICAL — the warm lanterns glowing live. SEPARATION — the courtyard shadow held rich so she reads about 2 stops up. BOUNCE — a warm kick adding a dewy catch to the bottle.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium close, chest-up, 12% headroom, the bottle entering the lower third, lush monsoon negative space camera-left to receive the rain and jasmine that arrive later.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A chest-up medium-close beauty frame, about 12% headroom, the bottle in the lower third, lush monsoon negative space camera-left for the rain and jasmine. Aira is centred in a graceful kathak carriage — torso lifted and rotated about 6 degrees, weight poised on a soft demi-plié ready to spin with a 3-degree hip curve. Camera near and intimate. Her left arm is mid-mudra flourish, the line travelling shoulder to fingertip, so she reads near-frontal and lifted, the poised demi-plié coiling latent spin energy — the joyful opening of the kathak phrase. COMPOSITION REFERENCE: joyful romantic-beauty hero (monsoon-dusk kathak-editorial still) — product-at-face, dewy, warm, scroll-stopping.

ATMOSPHERE: joyful, romantic, fresh — the warmth of a monsoon courtyard, rain catching lantern light on silk and skin.

COLOR GRADE: warm monsoon dusk — deep-green and gold highlights, warm amber-lantern midtones, soft teal shadows, rich clean blacks, luminous dewy speculars, zero grain, bright warm vibrance, no muddy grey or washed contrast (vivid monsoon-dusk lane).

## Frame 3 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium, chest-up to mid-forearm, subject fills about 60% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a slow continuing push with a gentle 5° arc following her chakkar (one flowing move), otherwise stable.

LENS: 85mm, f/2.2.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: her arm extends wide and around on a swelling beat as the body begins a fast spotted chakkar and the opposite arm carves a low counter-circle mudra — a continuous kathak spin that grows directly out of the previous extension, full follow-through, crisp and rotational with clean spotting, the dance and the swirling jasmine moving as one. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: chakkar arm extends wide and around through the spin, spine spirals upright into the spotted rotation, opposite arm carves a low counter-circle mudra, legs drive the chakkar with crisp spotting footwork.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–3.0s — the falling rain caught in her spin begins to transform into white jasmine petals swirling up around her as she whirls into a chakkar.
- 3.0–6.0s — the petals climb brighter as her eyes brighten with joyful wonder and the spin carries through with clean spotting. One clean continuous chakkar, real joyful physics.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: life never stops — breath lifting the chest, the dupatta and braid-jasmine flaring with the spin, micro weight-shifts driving through the spotting footwork, the chakkar arm carrying a living follow-through, living eyes and a crisp spot-and-blink; no freeze, no robotic hold.

LIGHTING: lantern-gold key with soft warm fill; a soft teal-and-gold rim igniting the swirling petals live; the courtyard shadow rich; lanterns flaring with the motion.

ENVIRONMENT: monsoon courtyard, the jasmine swirling and rain turning to petals, lush vines behind.

AUDIO: diegetic plus the music bed. Ambient — soft falling rain and distant thunder. SFX — a sharp dupatta-whoosh at 0.6s, a rising soft petal-flutter from 1.2s as the jasmine blooms, crisp ghungroo-chimes 1.5–3.0s on the spotting footwork. Reaction — a joyful soft breath at 3.0s. The master track lifts — tabla, sitar and warm strings joined by a soft swelling tihai rhythm under the flutter (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 4 seconds (0:06–0:10 of 24s total).

LIP-SYNC: none.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (rain/jasmine/petal/dupatta/hair/silk/light), mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 6 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium close, chest-up, subject fills about 56% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a slow gentle pull easing back toward the Frame 1 distance (one flowing move), no whip.

# CONCEPT 9 — VELVET TANGO NOIR

Title: Pillar 1 — Passion Drama (after-dark noir fragrance beauty)

Format: Art-Deco Noir Fragrance Beauty Hero / Smoke-and-Rose Editorial (BR category — sultry modest velvet-glow) — SPOKEN REEL

Hero Product: "Velvet Noir" eau de parfum — a faceted smoky-black glass flacon with a rose-gold collar, a fine atomizer and a deep-wine juice that throws warm amber-and-rose speculars; accent hero a single drifting curl of dark scent-smoke catching the spotlight.

Setting: a moody art-deco noir salon at night — black-lacquer panelling, brass inlay and a single tall mirror, deep wine-velvet drapes, a worn parquet floor, smoky low air, one dramatic warm-amber spotlight pooling on her against deep shadow (rich dark noir lane, NOT bright studio).

Wardrobe: a floor-length structured black velvet gown with a modest high funnel-neck and long fitted sleeves, a sculptural bias-cut silhouette and a faint deep-wine sheen where the spotlight rakes the nap, fully modest, no skin emphasis, a single slim rose-gold cuff at one wrist.

Hair: a glossy vintage Hollywood deep-side-part finger-wave swept to one shoulder, high lacquered sheen, a few precise face-framing waves, color locked to reference.

Makeup: noir glamour: a soft warm-taupe smoked eye, a fine brass highlight on the high points, soft-set brows, a matte deep-wine lip with a single soft light-point, dewy-matte real skin with visible pores and fine vellus texture preserved.

Choreography: solo tango — slow controlled ochos (figure-eight pivots), long clean leg-lines kept modest and floor-bound, a sweeping single-arm frame as if leading an invisible partner, a slow giro turn and a held corté pause; every movement is weighted, sultry and continuous, hips and spine spiralling smoothly, joints soft, never a held or stiff pose (controlled slow-burn flow throughout).

Movement / Transform: scent-mist → smoke-to-rose petal dissolve (the one impossible move) — a curl of dark scent-smoke she releases from the atomizer gathers, then blooms mid-air into a slow spiralling swirl of deep-red velvet rose petals that wheel around her through the turn, settling into a few drifting petals.

Concept Line: "wear the night."

Duration: 21 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SULTRY NOIR (MODEST)

Composition: centered noir hero with rich warm chiaroscuro negative space camera-left for the smoke-and-petal bloom to spiral.

Grade: warm noir chiaroscuro — deep wine and black, warm-amber highlights, brass speculars, rich uncrushed blacks, a faint smoky haze, full mid-tone, bright sultry vibrance, no harsh clipping (rich dark noir lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "wear the night." (English, natural Indian accent, low, slow and velvety.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (a low salon room tone, a faint atomizer-hiss, soft velvet-and-parquet shoe-pivots, a delicate petal-flutter) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a smoky noir-tango bed with bandoneón, upright bass, brushed snare and sultry strings, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the gown is fully modest; the mood is sultry, elegant and noir, never sexualized; movement is choreographic, controlled and powerful.

## Frame 2 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.2.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: the giro reaches full flight with the petals wheeling around her — one continuous weighted rotation flowing straight out of Frame 3's turn-initiation, both arms sweeping a wide tango frame through the swirl, the skirt flaring on real centrifugal force, soft joints throughout, the peak eased rather than snapped. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the turning leg drives the smooth rotation; (b) both arms sweep the wide frame through the petals; (c) the spine holds its long spiral arch; (d) the trailing leg completes the modest carving arc.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–3.0s — Aira turns through the apex of the giro as the full swirl of deep-red velvet petals wheels around her, a few tumbling past the lens.
- 3.0–6.0s — a radiant sultry near-smile breaks as her eyes follow a petal past her face and the swirl reaches its fullest orbit. One clean continuous phrase, transform and dance as one, real physics throughout.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: maximal life — breath lifting the chest, the finger-waves streaming and settling with the turn, the skirt flaring and rippling on real airflow, every petal tumbling on its own weighted path with motion blur, micro weight-shifts rolling over the turning axis, living eyes and a soft blink; absolutely no freeze, no robotic snap, the rotation continuous.

LIGHTING: warm-amber key with soft fill; a warm brass rim blazing on the finger-wave, shoulder, flared skirt and orbiting petals; strong warm petal-bloom light living across her face; the salon held deep; a last smoke-wisp dissolving above.

SFX — a rich layered petal-flutter swelling through the swirl from 0.6s (soft airy body, long tail), velvet-and-parquet shoe-pivots at 1.8s and 4.5s, a soft fabric-flare whoosh at 3.0s. # CONCEPT 10 — HOLOGRAPHIC VOGUE

Title: Pillar 3 — Future Pop (holographic futuristic beauty)

Format: Futuristic Holographic Beauty Hero / Vogue-Femme Editorial (BR category — cool neon holo-glow) — SPOKEN REEL

Hero Product: "Prism Flux" holographic highlighter — a faceted iridescent compact with a mirror-chrome lid that throws shifting rainbow speculars; the pressed powder a pearlescent holo-white that flares cyan-magenta-violet as it catches the light.

Setting: a futuristic infinity-mirror holo-chamber — a polished chrome floor, dark walls lined with shifting holographic light-grids, cyan-magenta-violet holo-glow, floating volumetric light-planes drifting through the air, deep neon-blue shadow (cool neon holo lane, NOT warm studio).

Wardrobe: a sleek chrome-iridescent structured catsuit-gown with a high funnel-neck and long fitted sleeves and an architectural holographic peplum, fully modest, futuristic couture, the surface shifting iridescent cyan-magenta-violet under the holo-light, a slim chrome cuff at one wrist, no skin emphasis.

Hair: a sleek ultra-high-gloss chrome-black futuristic ponytail with a razor-sharp face-frame, lacquered to a mirror sheen, color locked to reference.

Makeup: holographic glass-skin: an iridescent prism highlight on the high points, a graphic chrome-silver liner flick, soft-set brows, a chrome-holo lip, a dewy glass finish with visible pores and fine vellus texture preserved.

Choreography: vogue femme — precise hand-performance (illusion hand-waves, wrist-rolls and box-arm frames), dramatic arm lines, a confident catwalk strut, a controlled modest vogue dip (a slow controlled descent, never a drop) and hinted level-changes kept modest; sharp angles that hit clean on the beat then melt straight into the next move, fluid and athletic, never robotic or held.

Movement / Transform: hologram-glitch outfit shift (the one impossible move) — on a sharp finger-clack her catsuit's iridescent surface glitches and re-skins through a fast cascade of holographic patterns and colors (cyan → magenta → violet → chrome), a clean datamosh-style shimmer that re-skins garment and light only, never the face or body.

Concept Line: "glitch into the light."

Duration: 18 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: FUTURISTIC FIERCE

Composition: centered neon hero with cool holo negative space camera-right for the glitch-cascade and drifting light-planes.

Grade: cool neon holo — cyan, magenta and violet, chrome speculars, deep neon-blue shadow, rich uncrushed blacks, crisp high-energy contrast, bright saturated vibrance, no clipping (cool neon lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "glitch into the light." (English, natural Indian accent, crisp, confident and futuristic-cool.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (a low holo-chamber hum, holographic shimmer-zaps, sharp finger-clacks, heel-clicks on the chrome floor, a glitch-stutter) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a futuristic vogue-house bed with deep synth-bass, a crisp ballroom beat, glitch-FX and bright synth-stabs, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the catsuit-gown is fully modest; the glitch re-skins garment and light only, never the face or body, never sexualized; movement is precise, athletic and controlled.

## Frame 1 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium close, chest-up, subject fills about 55% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a single slow 8% push-in across the clip, otherwise locked-off and stable — one move only, no whip.

MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the framing arm snaps to a precise angle then eases; (b) the compact hand rises to cheek height; (c) the hips settle into the grounded vogue stance; (d) the gaze locks fierce to lens.

## Frame 4 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-wide, near-full figure, subject fills about 48% of the vertical frame with the glitch-cascade blazing across the rest.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a smooth 8% arc-left orbiting the peak frame (one flowing move) with a faint counter for parallax, stable and motivated.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.2.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: the vogue frame reaches full flight as the chrome re-skin blazes — one continuous athletic peak flowing straight out of Frame 3's ignition, both arms throwing wide on real momentum, the peplum flaring, soft joints throughout, the peak eased rather than snapped. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the driving leg presses the powerful stance; (b) both arms throw wide into the peak frame; (c) the spine holds its long arch; (d) the wrists roll a final crisp accent.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–4.0s — Aira throws both arms wide into a powerful vogue frame as the glitch cascades through violet into a full mirror-chrome re-skin.
- 4.0–6.0s — a radiant fierce near-smile blazes as the chrome-light slides across her face and the wrists roll a final crisp accent. One clean continuous phrase, re-skin and frame as one, real physics throughout.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: maximal life — breath lifting the chest, the ponytail streaming and settling, the peplum flaring on real airflow, the glitch-blocks stuttering on a real rhythm, micro weight-shifts rolling over the driving leg, living eyes and a soft blink; absolutely no freeze, no robotic snap, the move continuous.

LIGHTING: crisp cool key with cyan-magenta-violet glitch-rims at full spike; a chrome-white rim blazing on the hair, shoulders and wide arms; chrome glitch-light living across her face; the chamber held deep; holo-grids blazing behind.

ENVIRONMENT: holo-chamber blazing with a full holographic chrome re-skin and rolling scanlines on real digital rhythm.

AUDIO: diegetic only. Ambient — low holo-chamber hum. SFX — a rich layered glitch-shimmer swelling through the cascade from 0.6s (digital body, crisp tail), a chrome-ring whoosh at 2.0s, heel-clicks on the chrome floor at 1.2s and 4.8s. Reaction — a fierce exhilarated breath at 2.4s. The master track reaches its fullest sanctioned level here — synth-bass, ballroom beat, glitch-FX and bright synth-stabs blooming under the peak (present and driving, still never a full driving mix). VO — none this frame.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips resolve to the softly-parted fierce half-smile of the open.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (iridescence/hair/light-plane/light), loop-mismatch with Frame 1, mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, frozen background, identity flicker.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 10 — full reel, lands across the cut, anchored at the Frame 4 chrome re-skin and the Frame 5 line): a futuristic vogue-house score for an 18-second vertical beauty reel. STYLE/GENRE — fierce futuristic ballroom / vogue-house, glossy and electric. INSTRUMENTATION — a deep rolling synth-bass, a crisp ballroom beat (sharp kick, tight snare, hi-hat rolls), glitch-FX and stutters, bright supersaw synth-stabs, and a cold pad shimmer underneath. TEMPO & KEY — about 124 BPM, a driving four-on-the-floor pulse in A minor with a bright lift at the chrome-peak. ARRANGEMENT ACROSS THE CUT — 0:00–0:03 a low synth-bass pulse kindling under the holo-hum (Frame 1); 0:03–0:06 the bass joined by a building ballroom-beat rim as the hand winds up (Frame 2); 0:06–0:09 glitch-FX and the first bright synth-stabs hit on the clack as the outfit ignites (Frame 3 transform-start); 0:09–0:12 the full electric bloom — synth-bass, ballroom beat, glitch-FX and bright stabs reaching their fullest sanctioned level under the chrome re-skin (Frame 4 transform-peak, present and driving, still never full); 0:12–0:15 the bed eases back to a low synth-pulse leaving room for the spoken line "glitch into the light" (Frame 5); 0:15–0:18 the phrase resolves and dips back to the lone synth-bass pulse of the open so the end loops seamlessly into the beginning (Frame 6, AX.5). MIX RULE — keep it low and underneath the diegetic holo-hum, finger-clack, glitch-stutter and heel-click SFX — electric and present, never a full driving mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

# CONCEPT 11 — BUTTERFLY GARDEN METAMORPHOSIS

Title: Pillar 5 — Nature Magic (enchanted botanical beauty)

Format: Magical Nature Beauty Hero / Contemporary-Lyrical Editorial (BG category — warm sunlit golden-green) — SPOKEN REEL

Hero Product: "Nectar Bloom" illuminating serum — a petal-curved rose-gold droplet bottle with a clear glass pipette, the golden serum holding a slow drift of fine gold shimmer, a dewy bead catching the sun at the pipette tip.

Setting: a sunlit enchanted butterfly conservatory — a glass dome laced with climbing jasmine and roses, soft golden-hour beams raking through the panes, drifting pollen and motes in the light, lush green foliage and warm florals, real monarch butterflies wheeling slowly (warm golden-green lane).

Wardrobe: a structured petal-layered gown in soft blush-and-cream with sheer organza wing-like back panels, a high neck and long fitted sleeves, a bias skirt to the floor, fully modest and pristine, the organza catching the golden light.

Hair: a soft romantic low updo with a few face-framing tendrils, fresh and airy, a faint golden sheen, color locked to reference.

Makeup: fresh dewy glass-skin: soft coral-gold blush, a golden-shimmer wash on the lid, soft-set brows, a glossy nude-rose lip, a luminous dewy finish with visible pores and fine vellus texture preserved.

Choreography: contemporary-lyrical — slow unfurling port de bras (arms opening like unfolding wings), a gentle rising spiral, soft sustained balances, a tender reach toward the light, fluid spine ripples and a slow controlled developpé, modest throughout; weighted, continuous and breathing, like a creature emerging, never robotic or held.

Movement / Transform: chrysalis-to-wing bloom (the one impossible move) — drifting pollen and the organza back-panels gather and bloom into luminous monarch-butterfly wings of golden light as real butterflies wheel up around her and her panels unfurl; the bloom is garment, light and butterflies only, never the face or body.

Concept Line: "unfold, and bloom."

Duration: 21 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: TRANSFORMATIVE TENDER

Composition: centered sunlit hero with warm golden-green negative space camera-left for the wing-bloom and wheeling butterflies.

Grade: warm sunlit golden-green — honey-gold highlights, fresh green mid-tones, soft blush florals, rich uncrushed shadow, gentle airy contrast, bright natural vibrance, no clipping (warm golden lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — "unfold, and bloom." (English, natural Indian accent, soft, warm and tender.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (a soft conservatory ambience of birdsong and rustling leaves, a glass-pipette dewdrop, gentle butterfly-wing flutters, a soft organza unfurl) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a tender orchestral-and-harp bloom with warm strings and soft woodwind, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the gown is fully modest; the bloom transforms organza, light and butterflies only, never the face or body, never sexualized; movement is tender, fluid and controlled.

## Frame 3 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium, chest-up widening slightly, subject fills about 52% of the vertical frame to admit the bloom.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a slow 4% arc-left beginning to orbit the rise (one flowing move) blended with the ongoing gentle push, stable and motivated.

LENS: 85mm, f/2.2.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: the dew bursts exactly as the wings ignite — a single continuous lyrical rise flowing straight out of Frame 2's wing-line, the left arm lifting higher to catch the rising butterflies, soft elbows and wrists, the spine spiralling up, nothing snapped or held. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the serum hand releases as the bead bursts; (b) the left arm lifts into a rising wing-line; (c) the spine spirals and lengthens; (d) the supporting leg presses a soft rise.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–3.0s — the dew-bead falls and bursts into a soft golden shower as Aira spirals up and her organza panels begin to ignite into wing-light.
- 3.0–6.0s — the first golden veining lights along the wings and two butterflies lift to wheel as her eyes widen in soft wonder. One clean continuous phrase, transform and dance as one motion, real physics throughout.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: continuous life — breath driving the chest and the brightening panels, tendrils lifting, pollen swirling on real airflow, micro weight-shifts rolling through the rising leg, living eye saccades and a slow blink; no freeze, no robotic snap, the rise eased in and out.

LIGHTING: soft golden key with warm green fill and a new warm-gold bloom-light from the igniting wings; a honey-gold rim on the updo, shoulder and panels; warm bloom-light living across her cheek; the conservatory held warm; pollen swirling up.

ENVIRONMENT: conservatory with the air alive — dew-light scattering, organza igniting into wing-light, the first butterflies rising.

AUDIO: diegetic only. Ambient — soft birdsong and rustling leaves. SFX — a soft dew-burst sparkle at 1.0s, a gentle shimmering bloom-swell as the wings ignite at 2.8s (airy attack, soft tail), butterfly-wing flutters rising at 4.8s. Reaction — a soft awed breath at 3.0s. The master track opens up — the harp and warm strings joined by a soft woodwind and a gentle glockenspiel shimmer swelling under the transform (present, building, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 3 seconds (0:06–0:09 of 21s total).

MIX RULE — keep it low and underneath the diegetic birdsong, dewdrop, organza-unfurl and butterfly-flutter SFX — tender and present, never a full driving mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

# CONCEPT 12 — MOLTEN GOLD POUR STUDIO

Title: Molten Gold Pour Studio (Pillar 6 — Opulent Artisanal).

Format: Opulent Artisanal Beauty Hero / Sculptural Slow-Flow Editorial (warm gold-and-black lane — deliberate contrast against Concept 11's airy golden-green). SILENT reel.

Hero Product: the "Midas Veil" illuminating body oil — a faceted heavy-glass decanter of warm liquid gold, a gold-banded dropper stopper, the oil holding a slow drift of fine gold leaf, a single bead of gold trembling at the lip.

Setting: a dark sculptural artisan's atelier — a gilding workshop lit by a single warm spotlight through high windows, molten gold catching the light, fine gold dust adrift, raw plaster sculptures and gilded frames in deep shadow, a slow pour of liquid gold catching the beam (warm gold-on-black lane).

Wardrobe (AW): a sculptural liquid-satin gown in deep bronze-black that reads like draped metal, a high modest neckline, long fitted sleeves, a structured floor-length column with a soft sculptural train, fully modest.

Hair (AP): a sleek sculptural low chignon with a clean centre part, a faint warm gold sheen, not a strand loose, color locked.

Makeup (AQ): luminous warm bronze-gold — gilded glass-skin, a soft gold-bronze eye wash, sculpted warm cheekbone, a glossy bronze-nude lip, a single fine gold-leaf fleck at the cheekbone, luminous dewy finish.

Choreography: slow sculptural contemporary body-flow — deliberate, weighted, museum-slow port de bras, controlled contractions and long extensions, a slow sustained spiral and a grounded sculptural balance, modest and continuous, like a living gilded statue moving through honey-thick air.

Movement / Transform: liquid-gold pour skin-gild — a ribbon of molten gold pours down and sweeps across the gown, gilding the deep bronze-black satin into radiant sculpted gold that flows with her like living metal; the gild travels over garment, light and the gold-dust air only, never bare skin, never the face.

Concept Line: "become the masterpiece." (on-screen concept only — NOT spoken; silent reel).

Duration: 18s | 6 frames. Mood: OPULENT REVERENT.

Composition: single-subject sculptural hero, warm spotlight on black, deep negative space for the gold-pour to travel.

Grade: warm opulent gold-and-black — rich honey-gold highlights, deep velvety uncrushed blacks, warm bronze mid-tones, a single warm spotlight, controlled high contrast with bright gold vibrance, no clipping (warm gold-on-black lane).

Spoken line: NONE — silent reel (closed-lip serene composure throughout; the gold-pour and dust carry the sound).

Audio note: diegetic-led — the hush of the atelier, the slow viscous pour of molten gold, fine gold-dust shimmer and soft satin movement, under a low reverent score (no voice).

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the gown is fully modest; the gild transforms satin, light and gold-dust only, never the face or body, never sexualized; movement is slow, sculptural and controlled.

Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: the gild sweeps to full as she rises through the sculptural spiral — one continuous peak flowing straight out of Frame 3's ignition, both arms sweeping wide on real momentum, the gold train flaring, soft joints throughout, the rise eased rather than snapped. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the driving leg presses the tall sculptural rise; (b) both arms sweep wide into the full frame; (c) the spine holds its long arch through the turn; (d) the wrists open sculptural among the gold dust.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–4.0s — Aira rises through the spiral as the molten gild sweeps the gown fully into a radiant living-gold column and gold dust wheels up around her.
- 4.0–6.0s — a radiant reverent near-smile breaks as her eyes follow the wheeling dust and the gild reaches its full blaze. One clean continuous phrase, transform and dance as one, real physics throughout.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: maximal life — breath lifting the chest, the chignon sheen blazing and settling, the gold train flaring on real airflow, every mote of gold dust wheeling on its own weighted path with motion blur, micro weight-shifts rolling over the driving leg, living eyes and a soft blink; absolutely no freeze, no robotic snap, the rise continuous.

LIGHTING: the single warm spotlight with soft fill and a strong warm-gold bloom from the gilded column; a warm gold rim blazing on the chignon, shoulders and gold-edges; warm gild-bloom light living across her face; the atelier held deep; gold dust lit warm as it wheels.

ENVIRONMENT: dark atelier momentarily blazing with a full living-gold gown and a wheeling cloud of gold dust on real airflow.

AUDIO: diegetic-led, no voice. Ambient — the low warm hush of the atelier. SFX — a rich warm gild-bloom shimmer swelling from 0.8s (warm body, long tail), a soft metallic ring as the column blazes at 2.4s, a soft gold-train flare-whoosh at 4.0s. Reaction — a soft awed breath at 4.4s. The master track builds toward its fullest sanctioned level — cello, warm strings, choir-pad and harp blooming under the gild-peak (present and lush, still never a full driving mix).

# CONCEPT 13 — CYBERPUNK RAIN KRUMP

Title: Cyberpunk Rain Krump (Pillar 7 — Urban Edge).

Format: Neon-Noir Street Beauty Hero / Explosive Krump Editorial (cool neon-on-wet-black lane — a hard gritty contrast against Concept 12's warm gold-on-black). SPOKEN.

Hero Product: the "Voltage" neon liquid liner — a sleek matte-black hexagonal pen with a neon-cyan cap-band and a fine precision tip, the liner a high-charge electric-cyan that throws a faint neon glow, a single bright bead of liner trembling at the tip.

Setting: a neon-soaked cyberpunk alley at night in the rain — wet black asphalt throwing mirror reflections of towering holographic billboards, magenta-and-cyan neon signage and kanji-style holograms, steam rising from street grates, fine rain falling and streaking through the neon, deep wet-black shadow (cool neon-noir lane).

Wardrobe (AW): a sleek modest high-neck long-sleeve techwear catsuit in matte charcoal with fine raised circuit-line piping, layered under a structured architectural moto coat with sharp shoulders, fully modest, the piping dark and dormant until the transform.

Hair (AP): a sleek wet-look high tech-ponytail with a razor-clean part and a few neon-cyan-tipped face-framing strands, a high lacquered sheen catching the neon, color locked.

Makeup (AQ): graphic neon — a sharp electric-cyan-and-magenta graphic liner wing, dewy glass-skin, a fine neon under-eye accent, sculpted cheekbone, soft-set brows, a glossy chrome-nude lip with a wet light-point, real pores and fine vellus texture.

Choreography: krump and popping — explosive chest-pops, powerful arm-swings and jabs, sharp shoulder and wrist isolations, grounded stomps and stamps, with fluid connective waves and rolls between the hits so the power flows rather than locking; every sharp hit lands clean then flows straight into the next, weighted and athletic, never stiff or frozen between beats.

Movement / Transform: neon-circuit light-up bodysuit — on a hard chest-pop the dormant circuit-line piping on her techwear ignites and runs with living neon-cyan and magenta light that pulses and chases across the suit in time with each hit; the light travels over the garment, the rain and the wet-black air only, never bare skin, never the face.

Concept Line: "feel the voltage." (lands Frame 5, spoken).

Duration: 18s | 6 frames. Mood: GRITTY ELECTRIC.

Composition: single-subject street hero, neon key on wet black, deep reflective negative space for the circuit-light and rain to read.

Grade: cool neon-noir — electric-cyan and magenta neon highlights, deep wet-black uncrushed shadow, cool teal mid-tones, mirror-wet reflections, controlled high contrast with bright neon vibrance, no clipping (cool neon-on-wet-black lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "feel the voltage." (English, natural Indian accent, low, fierce and electric.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (falling rain, steam-hiss, neon-buzz, wet stomps and fabric-snaps, a circuit-ignite zap) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a gritty electronic bed with a hard beat, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the catsuit and coat are fully modest; the transform ignites circuit-piping, light and rain only, never the face or body, never sexualized; movement is powerful, athletic and controlled.

---

## Frame 1 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: the sleek modest high-neck long-sleeve techwear catsuit in matte charcoal with fine raised circuit-line piping (dark and dormant), layered under the structured architectural moto coat with sharp shoulders, beaded with fine rain catching the neon, fully modest, pristine.

HAIR: the sleek wet-look high tech-ponytail with a razor-clean part and a few neon-cyan-tipped face-framing strands, a high lacquered sheen catching the magenta-and-cyan neon, color locked to reference.

MAKEUP: graphic neon — a sharp electric-cyan-and-magenta graphic liner wing, dewy glass-skin beaded with the faintest rain-mist, a fine neon under-eye accent, sculpted cheekbone, soft-set brows, a glossy chrome-nude lip with a wet light-point, real pores and fine vellus texture.

HANDS & NAILS: right hand gripping the matte-black hexagonal Voltage liner pen at collarbone height, fingertips firm but unstrained on the neon-cyan cap-band; left hand cocked in a sharp krump-ready claw near the ribs, fingers alive and charged; short almond nails in a chrome-charcoal gloss with a fine neon-cyan tip, cuticles neat.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a fierce focused intensity — chin dropped a hard 2°, brows pulled low and sharp, a tight controlled set to the jaw, eyes burning and direct to lens catching twin cyan-and-magenta neon catchlights, lips barely parted on a held charged breath.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: a powerful grounded krump stance, feet planted wide and low, knees bent and athletic, torso dropped into a coiled forward lean of about 8°, one shoulder cocked, weight loaded explosively across both legs with a 3° hip counter-rotation, spine strong and alive, clearly coiled mid-phrase not held.

CHOREOGRAPHY FLOW: the opening beat of an explosive krump phrase — her left arm is mid-jab-recoil, the recoil travelling fist to elbow to a sharp shoulder, the torso coiling from a just-landed chest-pop; the frame catches the loaded instant between two hard hits, the power flowing through a soft connective wrist-wave so nothing locks rigid. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the left arm recoils sharp from the jab; (b) a connective wave ripples back through the shoulder to keep it fluid; (c) the torso coils for the next pop; (d) the weight loads explosively across the planted legs.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) fine rain falling and streaking through the neon behind her; (2) the neon-cyan liner glow pulsing faintly at the pen tip; (3) a rain-bead trembling on the moto-coat shoulder; (4) a neon-tipped strand stuck wet to her temple stirring a hair; (5) chest rising hard on a charged inhale; (6) magenta-and-cyan speculars sliding along the wet pen and coat; (7) her recoiling fist carrying the last of the jab's snap-settle; (8) a slow charged blink completing.

BACKGROUND — the neon alley falling to wet-black, towering holographic billboards and magenta-cyan signage softly defocused with one cooler pool behind her head for clean separation, rain streaking, no clutter.

## Frame 1 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium close, chest-up, subject fills about 55% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a single slow 8% push-in across the clip with a faint handheld energy, otherwise stable — one move only, no whip.

LENS: 35mm, f/2.0, wet neon-bokeh fall-off.

CHOREOGRAPHY & FLUID MOTION: her left arm completes a sharp jab-recoil that flows through a connective shoulder-wave as the torso coils for the next hit — the krump power lands clean then rolls fluid so the energy never locks rigid, weighted, athletic and explosive yet connected. MOVEMENT BREAKDOWN: (a) the left arm recoils sharp from the jab; (b) a connective wave ripples back through the shoulder; (c) the torso coils for the next pop; (d) the weight loads explosively across the planted legs.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING:
- 0.0–3.0s — Aira snaps a sharp jab-recoil and rolls it through her shoulder as she grips the Voltage pen, neon speculars sliding along the wet matte-black.
- 3.0–6.0s — she drops her chin and locks a fierce gaze to lens on a charged inhale, coiling low as the rain streaks behind her. One clean continuous phrase, real explosive physics throughout.

MICRO-MOVEMENT / ANTI-STIFFNESS: never frozen — a constant charged life: breath driving the chest hard, the wet ponytail carrying a snap-settle, a neon-tipped strand stirring, rain beading and running on the coat, micro weight-shifts loading through the planted legs between hits, living eye saccades and a charged blink; absolutely no mannequin hold, no statue freeze, the krump sharp but never robotic or stuttery.

LIGHTING: hard cyan neon key with magenta fill; live neon speculars sliding across the wet pen and coat as she moves; the alley held wet-black; a neon-cyan rim on the ponytail and coat-shoulder; rain streaking through the neon.

ENVIRONMENT: neon-soaked cyberpunk alley in the rain, wet-black asphalt reflecting billboards, magenta-cyan signage, steam rising from grates.

AUDIO: diegetic only, no in-clip music. Ambient bed — steady falling rain, a low neon-buzz and distant city hum throughout. SFX — a wet fabric-snap as her jab recoils at 0.8s, a faint steam-hiss from a grate at 3.2s, a sharp neon-flicker buzz at 4.8s timed to the chin-drop. Reaction — a hard charged breath at 3.0s. The master track sits low — a deep sub-bass and a tight muted hi-hat just kindling under the rain (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 3 seconds (0:00–0:03 of 18s total).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the jab-recoil and shoulder-wave; playback 24fps real-time.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips closed/softly parted, fierce.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (rain/neon/piping/hair/fabric/light), mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, stuttery jerk, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 4 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-wide, head-to-thigh, subject fills about 66% of the vertical frame.

LIGHTING: the hard cyan key resolving to the exact Frame 1 state as the circuit-glow dims out; a neon-cyan rim on the ponytail and coat-shoulder; the alley held wet-black; rain streaking through the neon.

ENVIRONMENT: neon alley restored to its opening charged hum, the circuit-piping dormant-dark again, rain falling, steam drifting.

AUDIO: diegetic only. Ambient — steady rain, low neon-buzz and city hum settling to match the open. SFX — a soft circuit-dim power-down hum at 1.2s, a faint rain-spatter at 2.8s, a wet fabric-settle as the stance re-coils at 4.0s, easing to the exact opening ambience for a seamless audio loop. Reaction — a hard charged breath at 4.8s. The master track resolves its phrase and dips back to the lone sub-bass-and-hi-hat of the open so the end flows back into the beginning (present, never full).

DURATION: 3 seconds (0:15–0:18 of 18s total).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the settle and pull-back; playback real-time, the final frame matched to Frame 1 for an invisible loop.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips resolve to the fiercely-set, barely-parted Frame 1 state.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (rain/neon/coat/hair/light), circuit-light touching the face or skin, loop-mismatch with Frame 1, residual circuit-glow, mannequin posture, robotic snapping motion, stuttery jerk, frozen background, identity flicker.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 13 — full reel, lands across the cut, anchored at the Frame 4 circuit-chase combo and the Frame 5 line): a gritty cyberpunk electronic score for an 18-second vertical beauty reel. STYLE/GENRE — dark neon-trap / industrial-EDM, hard and wet. INSTRUMENTATION — a deep distorted sub-bass, a tight trap beat with crisp hi-hats and a hard kick, a snarling synth-lead, glitchy circuit-zap textures and a low industrial drone. TEMPO & KEY — about 140 BPM (half-time feel), a hard 4/4 in a cold F# minor. ARRANGEMENT ACROSS THE CUT — 0:00–0:03 the sub-bass and a tight muted hi-hat kindling under the rain (Frame 1); 0:03–0:06 a rising synth-zap riser and the beat building as she charges (Frame 2); 0:06–0:09 the beat DROPS with a hard kick and an electric circuit-ignite zap as the chest-pop fires the chase (Frame 3 transform-start); 0:09–0:12 the hard beat, driving bassline and a blazing snarling synth-lead crest with the full circuit-chase krump combo (Frame 4 transform-peak, present and hard, still never full); 0:12–0:15 the mix ducks clean under the spoken line “feel the voltage.” (Frame 5); 0:15–0:18 the phrase resolves and dips back to the lone sub-bass-and-hi-hat of the open so the end loops seamlessly into the beginning (Frame 6, AX.5). MIX RULE — the score stays underneath the diegetic rain, neon-buzz, chest-pop thud and circuit-zap SFX and ducks hard for the vocal — gritty and present, never a full driving mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

# CONCEPT 14 — SAKURA RIBBON ROOFTOP

Title: Sakura Ribbon Rooftop (Pillar 8 — Fresh Youthful).

Format: Fresh Airy Spring Beauty Hero / Rhythmic-Gymnastics Ribbon Editorial (bright pastel-daylight lane — a sunlit airy contrast against Concept 13's dark wet neon). SPOKEN.

Hero Product: the "Sakura Dew" dewy face mist — a frosted rose-glass bottle with a rose-gold atomizer collar and a soft petal-etched shoulder, a fine luminous dew-mist that catches the golden light into tiny rainbow motes, a single bright dew-bead trembling at the nozzle.

Setting: a sunlit rooftop garden at golden hour in spring — a cherry-blossom tree in full bloom arching overhead, soft pink petals drifting on a warm breeze, a city skyline soft in the warm haze below, pale-gold light raking low across blooming planters and a weathered stone balustrade, airy and bright (bright pastel-daylight lane).

Wardrobe (AW): a fresh modest pastel-pink spring midi dress in soft floaty crepe with a high modest neckline and long soft sleeves, a light knife-pleated skirt that lifts and catches the breeze, fully modest, fresh and pristine.

Hair (AP): a soft airy half-up with loose bouncy waves, a clean soft part, a few cherry-blossom petals caught in the strands, a fresh natural sheen in the golden light, a few face-framing wisps, color locked to reference.

Makeup (AQ): fresh dewy soft-glow — a soft rose wash on the lid, dewy glass-skin with a luminous golden-hour sheen, a sweep of soft pink blush high on the cheek, soft-set fluffy brows, a peachy-pink glossy lip with a wet light-point, real pores and fine vellus texture.

Choreography: rhythmic-gymnastics ribbon dance — sweeping overhead spirals, big looping figure-eights and circles, travelling snakes and coils with a long satin ribbon on a wand, light airy leaps, releve pivots and chaine turns; every movement is buoyant, graceful and continuous, the ribbon never stopping, the body flowing light and airy with soft joints and long lines, never a held or rigid pose.

Movement / Transform: petal-storm gown weave — the long satin ribbon she spirals dissolves mid-air into a swirling storm of cherry-blossom petals that weave and spiral around her, then settle as a delicate petal-trimmed flourish woven along the hem and sleeve of the dress; the petals and light move over the garment and the air only, never bare skin, never the face.

Concept Line: "bloom into spring." (lands Frame 5, spoken).

Duration: 18s | 6 frames. Mood: FRESH AIRY.

Composition: single-subject sunlit rooftop hero, low golden key, bright airy negative space for the ribbon and petal-storm to sweep.

Grade: bright pastel-daylight — soft blossom-pink and warm golden-hour highlights, gentle pastel mid-tones, a soft blue spring sky, airy lifted shadows (never crushed), bright fresh vibrance, no clipping (bright pastel-daylight lane).

Spoken line: lands Frame 5 — "bloom into spring." (English, natural Indian accent, light, warm and bright.)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (soft warm breeze, birdsong, the satin-ribbon whoosh, petal-flutter, gentle footwork on stone) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a fresh airy orchestral-pop bed with light strings, plucked harp, soft piano and a gentle beat, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; the spring midi dress is fully modest; the transform weaves petals, light and garment only, never the face or body, never sexualized; movement is buoyant, athletic and graceful.

SEPARATION — the background held airy and bright so she reads cleanly. BOUNCE — a warm gold kick adding a fresh catch to the bottle glass.

BACKGROUND — the cherry tree and skyline softly defocused with a warm gradient behind her head, clean separation, no clutter.
